title: Rubio Is Expected to Press G7 Allies Over Strait of Hormuz During Meeting
summary_full: The meeting in France is slated to discuss efforts to stop the war in the Middle East, end Iran’s nuclear and ballistic missile development, and reopen maritime trade routes.
